response: The serum and FF levels of 25-OH-VD, as well as the FF levels of TNF-α and TAC, were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits following the manufacturer's instructions. These measurements were performed using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech. MR 7000). The 25-OH-VD level was determined using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab213966, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (16). The TNF-α level was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab46087, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same technique (17). The TAC level was assessed using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab65329, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same technique (18).
